I now have a complete picture of the store. Here is my full SEO audit report:

---

# 🔍 SEO Audit Report — Arbasa Store
**URL:** `https://arbasa-7450.myshopify.com`
**Audit Date:** Today | **Pages Audited:** 6

---

## 🚨 Overall SEO Score: 0.0 / 100 — Critical

Every page audited returned an **SEO score of 0.0**, meaning the store has **zero measurable organic search presence**. This is a serious issue that needs immediate attention. Here's a full breakdown of everything found:

---

## 📋 Critical Issues Found

### 1. 🚫 All Products Are in DRAFT Status (9 out of 10)
| Product | Status |
|---|---|
| 100ML Plastic Storage Jar | ❌ Draft |
| 3-in-1 Vegetable Slicer | ❌ Draft |
| 39-Piece Home Repair Tool Kit | ❌ Draft |
| 4000 Sheets A4 White Paper | ❌ Draft |
| Dumpling & Spaghetti Maker | ❌ Draft |
| Egg Shell Opener & Peeler Tool | ❌ Draft |
| Expandable Stainless Steel Dish Drying Rack | ❌ Draft |
| SlicePro™ Vegetable Chopper | ❌ Draft |
| Wall-Mounted Rice & Grain Storage | ❌ Draft |
| 1-Color Screen Printing Machine | ✅ Active |

> ⚠️ **Draft products are invisible to Google.** They cannot be indexed, ranked, or found by any shopper via search. This is likely the #1 reason for a 0.0 SEO score.

---

### 2. ❌ Zero Domain Rating & Zero Backlinks
- **Domain Rating:** `null` — Google doesn't yet trust this domain
- **Referring Domains:** `null` — No other sites link to this store
- **Organic Traffic:** `null` — No visitors from search engines
- **Backlinks:** `null` — No authority signals at all

> 🔑 This is a brand-new or brand-neglected domain. Without backlinks and domain authority, ranking on Google is nearly impossible without fixing on-page SEO first.

---

### 3. 🏷️ Product Titles Wrapped in Unnecessary Quotes
Every product title contains **unnecessary quotation marks** (e.g., `"100ML Plastic Storage Jar"`). This:
- Looks unprofessional in Google search results
- Breaks SEO meta title formatting
- Reduces click-through rates in SERPs

---

### 4. 📦 Handle/URL Mismatches (Confusing Google)
Some products have mismatched URLs vs. their titles. Example:
- **Product Title:** `39-Piece Home Repair Tool Kit`
- **URL Handle:** `/3-4-5-sections-stainless-steel-divided-dinner-tray-lunch-container`

> This suggests a product was renamed without updating the URL handle — a major SEO confusion signal.

---

### 5. 💸 Out-of-Stock Products Still Listed
- **4000 Sheets A4 White Paper** — `0 inventory`
- **Expandable Stainless Steel Dish Drying Rack** — `0 inventory`

> Out-of-stock products with no restock date harm user experience and waste crawl budget.

---

### 6. 📊 Sales Are Nearly Non-Existent
- **Total Orders (30 days):** 1
- **Total Revenue (30 days):** $39.95
- **Avg. Order Value:** $39.95
- **Only 1 active product** — the Screen Printing Machine (not even the best seller)

> The store's only recorded sale was a **SnoreSnoozer Pro Anti-Snoring Device** — a product that doesn't even appear in the current product list, suggesting inventory/catalog management issues.

---

### 7. 🔗 GA4 Traffic Not Connected
- Traffic analytics returned `"Not authenticated"` — meaning **Google Analytics is not connected**, so you're flying blind on where visitors come from.

---

## ✅ What's Working

| ✅ Positive Signal | Detail |
|---|---|
| Clean URL handles (most) | Handles like `/dumpling-spaghetti-maker` are short & descriptive |
| Consistent vendor branding | All products tagged under "Arbasa" |
| Reasonable price points | Products in the $7–$136 range — competitive |
| One active product | Screen Printing Machine is live & has 324 units in stock |

---

## 🛠️ Priority Action Plan

### 🔴 URGENT (Do This Today)
| # | Action | Impact |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Publish all draft products** | 🚀 Massive — makes them indexable |
| 2 | **Remove quotes from all product titles** | 🔍 Better SERP appearance |
| 3 | **Fix the mismatched URL handle** for the Tool Kit | 🔗 Fixes crawl confusion |

### 🟡 HIGH PRIORITY (This Week)
| # | Action | Impact |
|---|---|---|
| 4 | **Add SEO meta titles & descriptions** to every product | 📈 Needed for ranking |
| 5 | **Add relevant tags & keywords** to each product | 🏷️ Improves discoverability |
| 6 | **Connect Google Analytics (GA4)** | 📊 Enables traffic monitoring |
| 7 | **Remove or hide 0-inventory products** | 🧹 Cleaner crawl budget |

### 🟢 ONGOING (This Month)
| # | Action | Impact |
|---|---|---|
| 8 | **Start a blog** with keyword-rich content | 🌐 Builds domain authority |
| 9 | **Build backlinks** via social, directories, PR | ⬆️ Increases domain rating |
| 10 | **Add product descriptions** (currently likely empty) | 🔑 Critical on-page SEO |

---

## 🤖 Want Me to Auto-Fix These?

I can immediately take the following actions for you — just say the word:

- **"Fix all product titles"** → I'll strip the quotes and clean up all 10 titles
- **"Fix the Tool Kit URL"** → I'll correct the mismatched handle
- **"Write SEO descriptions"** → I'll generate keyword-optimized descriptions for each product
- **"Write a blog post"** → I'll draft and publish an SEO blog to build authority
- **"Send me this report by email"** → I'll email this full report to you

What would you like me to tackle first? 🚀
